overall.description: Gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a futuristic urban plaza, descending into an underground passage with reflective holographic flooring, and continuing along city sidewalks with elevated monorail tracks. The video transitions from first-person to third-person perspective as the character explores the neon-lit commercial district.

tall palm trees lining the pedestrian plaza

floating holographic display showing product advertisements
wide paved pedestrian area with directional markings

segments.scene_description: The video opens with a first-person perspective walking through a spacious futuristic urban plaza. Tall glass skyscrapers surround the area with large digital billboards and floating holographic advertisements visible. Palm trees line the walkway and a few pedestrians are scattered throughout the open space.

scene_state.functional_zone: underground pedestrian passage with reflective holographic flooring

events.description: camera switches from first person to third person perspective and descends into lower level
character descends concrete stairs into underground area with reflective surfaces

agents.ego_description: character with red hair descends stairs and walks through underground passage with highly reflective floors

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in green cap walking ahead on the reflective surface

entered.detail: wide concrete staircase descending to lower level
highly polished marble floor reflecting holographic advertisements from ceiling
concrete walls with posters and graffiti
reflected images of advertisements on the shiny floor surface

segments.scene_description: The perspective shifts to third-person as the character descends into an underground pedestrian area. The floor is highly reflective polished marble showing mirrored images of holographic advertisements overhead. Concrete walls line the passage and a few other pedestrians are visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban plaza with modern architecture and staircases

events.description: exiting underground area and ascending back to street level plaza
character ascends stairs returning to open plaza level

agents.ego_description: character climbs stairs and walks through open plaza with modern buildings and benches

contemporary building with large windows and purple neon accents
concrete seating with integrated yellow lighting

segments.scene_description: The character ascends back to street level into an open plaza area. Modern buildings with neon accents line the space, and concrete benches with integrated lighting are visible. The environment transitions from the enclosed underground back to the open air.

scene_state.functional_zone: city sidewalk with elevated monorail track overhead

events.description: moving from plaza to sidewalk alongside road with monorail structure overhead

agents.ego_description: walking along sidewalk under elevated monorail track with moderate pedestrian traffic

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in blue shirt and cap walking in same direction

entered.detail: elevated train track structure running above the street
building with large neon signage and digital displays
tall illuminated poles lining the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a city sidewalk with an elevated monorail track running overhead. Commercial buildings with bright neon signage line the street, and moderate pedestrian traffic moves in both directions. The area feels like a busy downtown commercial district.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk bench area with seated pedestrians

events.description: camera slows and approaches bench with three seated NPCs for close observation

agents.ego_description: approaching and observing NPCs sitting on a yellow bench against concrete wall

notable_agents.action: woman with blue hair reading a tablet device
person in neon green jacket reading a magazine

entered.detail: long yellow bench with three people seated
plain concrete wall behind the bench with blue sign
scattered newspapers and trash on ground near bench
concrete stairs leading upward in background

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches a yellow public bench where three NPCs are seated against a concrete wall. A woman with blue hair reads a tablet, a man in a suit sits in the middle, and a person in a neon jacket reads a magazine. Trash and newspapers are scattered on the ground nearby.

scene_state.functional_zone: city sidewalk continuing past bench area toward monorail

events.description: camera moves past the bench and continues along sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking past the bench area and continuing along the sidewalk with monorail visible ahead

notable_agents.action: man in blue shirt sitting alone on separate bench looking at phone

entered.detail: concrete pillars supporting the elevated track structure
large green-lit billboard with product advertisement
single yellow bench with occupant

segments.scene_description: The character moves past the bench area and continues along the sidewalk. The elevated monorail structure becomes visible again ahead, supported by concrete pillars. A man sits alone on another bench looking at his phone, and large digital advertisements line the buildings across the street.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey through a futuristic city, moving from a wide urban plaza down into a reflective underground passage and back into a bustling commercial district. It begins in a first-person perspective amidst towering glass skyscrapers and floating holographic advertisements, before shifting to a third-person view as the character descends into a polished marble tunnel where neon lights mirror off the floor. The scene then opens back up to the surface, transitioning from the enclosed concrete passage into an open-air plaza filled with neon-accented buildings and integrated lighting. As the camera continues along a city sidewalk beneath an elevated monorail track, the environment becomes more crowded with bright commercial signage and pedestrians. Finally, the movement slows past a yellow public bench where several NPCs are seated amidst scattered trash, before proceeding further down the street toward distant digital billboards and concrete pillars.
